note: Generated by scripts/scrape_sts2_wiki_builds.py; re-run to refresh.

builds.title: Silent Poison Build
builds.description: Stack Poison on enemies and watch them melt. Noxious Fumes provides passive scaling while you focus on survival. Catalyst doubles or triples Poison stacks for explosive burst damage. The most reliable Silent archetype.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Noxious Fumes
card_acquisition_priority.note: Passive 2 Poison per turn (3 upgraded) to ALL enemies. The foundation of every Poison build.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Burst
card_acquisition_priority.note: Play your next Skill twice. Burst + Catalyst = 6x Poison. Burst + Bouncing Flask = double AoE Poison.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Deadly Poison
card_acquisition_priority.note: Apply 5 Poison (7 upgraded) for 1 Energy. Most efficient single-target Poison applicator.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Bouncing Flask
card_acquisition_priority.note: Apply 3 Poison to a random enemy 3 times. Solves the AoE problem and stacks fast.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Footwork
card_acquisition_priority.note: Gain 2 Dexterity (3 upgraded). Makes every Block card more efficient while Poison works.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Backflip
card_acquisition_priority.note: 5 Block + draw 2 cards. Excellent defense that also digs for Catalyst.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Leg Sweep
card_acquisition_priority.note: Apply 2 Weak + 11 Block. Survivability card that buys time for Poison.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Malaise
card_acquisition_priority.note: Spend all Energy to apply that much Weak and remove that much Strength. Boss killer.

best.name: Ring of the Snake
best.note: Silent's starter relic. Draw 2 extra cards turn 1 to find key Poison pieces fast.

best.name: Snecko Skull
best.note: Gain 1 Poison on enemies when you apply Poison. Amplifies every Poison source in the deck.

best.name: Specimen
best.note: When a Poisoned enemy dies, transfer their Poison to a random enemy. Incredible in multi-fights.

good.name: Bag of Preparation
good.note: Draw 2 extra cards at start of combat. More chances to find Noxious Fumes and Catalyst early.

good.name: Kunai
good.note: Gain 1 Dexterity every 3 attacks. Better Block generation while Poison does the work.

good.name: Tungsten Rod
good.note: Reduce HP loss by 1. Helpful when enemies chip through your defense while waiting for Poison to kill.

avoid.name: Philosopher Stone
avoid.note: +1 Energy is nice but +1 Strength to enemies means they hit harder while you wait for Poison.

avoid.name: Ectoplasm
avoid.note: Can't gain Gold. Gold is important for Silent to buy key cards and relics from shops.

avoid.name: Mark Of Pain
avoid.note: Wounds added to draw pile dilute your deck, making it harder to draw Catalyst and key pieces.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Ring of the Snake
key_relics_sidebar.note: At the start of each combat, draw 2 additional cards.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Snecko Skull
key_relics_sidebar.note: Whenever you apply Poison, apply an additional 1 Poison.

builds.title: Silent Sly Build
builds.description: A fast-cycling deck that exploits the Silent's unique Sly keyword to play powerful cards for free when discarded. By rapidly cycling through a thin deck with discard effects, Sly cards trigger automatically, generating massive value without spending Energy. One of the most powerful and skill-intensive Silent archetypes.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Tools of the Trade
card_acquisition_priority.note: Guarantees a free discard (Sly trigger) every turn. The engine that makes the deck consistent.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Tactician
card_acquisition_priority.note: Sly Energy generator. When discarded, grants 1 Energy (2 upgraded). Fuels more card plays each turn.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Acrobatics
card_acquisition_priority.note: Primary draw + discard engine. Draw 3 (4 upgraded), discard 1 to trigger Sly. Essential cycling tool.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Untouchable
card_acquisition_priority.note: Core defensive Sly card. When discarded, provides free Block. Your primary survival tool.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Prepared
card_acquisition_priority.note: 0 Energy discard enabler. Draws 1, discards 1. Free Sly activation every time.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Calculated Gamble
card_acquisition_priority.note: Replace entire hand and trigger ALL Sly cards. Devastating combo potential on key turns.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Speedster
card_acquisition_priority.note: Deals damage while cycling. Provides consistent offensive output in the Sly engine.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Flick-Flack
card_acquisition_priority.note: Strong damage card that's even better when triggered by Sly discard.

best.name: Tingsha
best.note: Deals damage whenever you discard a card. In a Sly deck, you discard constantly — this adds up to massive free damage.

best.name: Tough Bandages
best.note: Gain Block whenever you discard a card. Combined with constant Sly discards, provides excellent passive defense.

best.name: The Abacus
best.note: Gain Block whenever you shuffle your draw pile. A thin cycling deck shuffles frequently, stacking free Block.

good.name: Nunchaku
good.note: Gain Energy after every 3 attacks played. Sly attack cards count, making this trigger frequently.

good.name: Ornamental Fan
good.note: Gain Block after every 3 attacks. Sly attacks trigger this, providing extra defense.

good.name: Pendulum
good.note: Draw a card on shuffle. A fast-cycling deck shuffles often, giving more draw opportunities.

avoid.name: Velvet Choker
avoid.note: Limits to 6 cards per turn. Sly cards count as plays, so this severely limits the deck's cycling potential.

avoid.name: Snecko Eye
avoid.note: Randomizing costs conflicts with the precise Energy management this deck requires.

avoid.name: Cursed Key
avoid.note: Adding Curses bloats the deck and blocks cycling efficiency.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Tingsha
key_relics_sidebar.note: Whenever you discard a card during your turn, deal 3 damage to a random enemy for each card discarded.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Tough Bandages
key_relics_sidebar.note: Whenever you discard a card during your turn, gain 3 Block.

builds.title: Silent Grand Finale Infinite Build
builds.description: An infinite combo build that cycles the entire deck to repeatedly play Grand Finale, dealing 50 damage to all enemies each loop. By keeping the deck extremely thin and using discard/draw cards to empty the draw pile, Grand Finale can be played multiple times per turn for devastating AoE damage that trivializes every encounter.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Grand Finale
card_acquisition_priority.note: The win condition. 50 AoE damage when draw pile is empty. Take every copy — multiple copies mean multiple plays per cycle.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Acrobatics
card_acquisition_priority.note: Draw 3, discard 1. Primary cycle tool and Sly activator. Upgraded draws 4 for even faster cycling.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Calculated Gamble
card_acquisition_priority.note: Replace entire hand. Instantly empties draw pile when timed correctly. Triggers all Sly cards in hand.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Tactician
card_acquisition_priority.note: Sly Energy. Discarded by Acrobatics or Gamble, gives free Energy to keep playing cards in the cycle.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Reflex
card_acquisition_priority.note: Draws cards when discarded via Sly. Accelerates the cycle without costing Energy.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Backflip
card_acquisition_priority.note: Draw 2 + Block. Helps fine-tune draw pile count and provides defense.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Prepared
card_acquisition_priority.note: 0 Energy, draw 1, discard 1. Cheap cycle tool that triggers Sly and adjusts draw pile count.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Escape Plan
card_acquisition_priority.note: Draw 1 card and potentially gain Block. Helps adjust draw pile count precisely.

best.name: Pendulum
best.note: Draw a card on every shuffle. A cycling deck shuffles constantly, giving extra draws to reach Grand Finale faster.

best.name: Bag of Preparation
best.note: Draw 2 extra cards at the start of combat. Gets the cycle engine started faster on turn 1.

best.name: Sundial
best.note: Gain Energy every 3 shuffles. The infinite cycle shuffles many times per turn, generating free Energy.

good.name: The Abacus
good.note: Gain Block on shuffle. Provides passive defense while cycling through the deck.

good.name: Ring of the Snake
good.note: Silent's starter relic. Draw 2 extra cards on turn 1, helping assemble the first cycle faster.

good.name: White Star
good.note: Helps draw Grand Finale faster, especially in the first few turns before the deck is fully thinned.

avoid.name: Velvet Choker
avoid.note: Hard cap of 6 cards per turn. The infinite cycle needs to play 10+ cards per turn to function.

avoid.name: Cursed Key
avoid.note: Adding Curses to the deck is catastrophic for a build that needs the smallest possible deck.

avoid.name: Snecko Eye
avoid.note: Randomizing costs breaks the precise Energy calculation needed for the cycle.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Pendulum
key_relics_sidebar.note: Whenever you shuffle your Draw Pile, draw a card.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Bag of Preparation
key_relics_sidebar.note: At the start of each combat, draw 2 additional cards.

builds.title: Silent Shiv Build
builds.description: Generate waves of Shivs boosted by Accuracy for rapid-fire damage. Each Shiv is a free 0-cost attack that triggers on-attack relics. Fast, aggressive, and deeply satisfying.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Accuracy
card_acquisition_priority.note: Every copy adds +4 damage (+6 upgraded) to all Shivs. The single most important card.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Blade Dance
card_acquisition_priority.note: Generate 3 Shivs (4 upgraded) for 1 Energy. Core Shiv generation.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Infinite Blades
card_acquisition_priority.note: Generate 1 Shiv at the start of each turn. Free persistent value.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Cloak and Dagger
card_acquisition_priority.note: Gain 6 Block + 1 Shiv (2 Shivs upgraded). Defense and offense in one card.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Afterimage
card_acquisition_priority.note: Gain 1 Block for every card played. With 6+ Shivs per turn, that's 6+ free Block.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Backflip
card_acquisition_priority.note: 5 Block + draw 2 cards. Defensive staple that digs for Accuracy and Shiv generators.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Knife Trap
card_acquisition_priority.note: When attacked, generate Shivs. Reactive Shiv generation that punishes enemies for attacking.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Finisher
card_acquisition_priority.note: Deals damage per attack played this turn. After playing 6 Shivs, Finisher deals 36+ damage.

best.name: Shuriken
best.note: Gain 1 Strength every 3 attacks played. Shivs are attacks — 6 Shivs per turn = +2 Strength per turn.

best.name: Kunai
best.note: Gain 1 Dexterity every 3 attacks played. Shivs trigger this constantly, making your Block cards insane.

best.name: Ring of the Snake
best.note: Draw 2 extra cards turn 1. More cards = more Shiv generators found early.

good.name: Ornamental Fan
good.note: Gain 4 Block every 3 attacks. Shivs trigger this constantly for free passive Block.

good.name: Pen Nib
good.note: Every 10th attack deals double damage. Count your Shivs to align the 10th hit with a real attack.

good.name: Bag of Preparation
good.note: Draw 2 more cards at start of combat. Find Blade Dance and Accuracy faster.

avoid.name: Velvet Choker
avoid.note: 6 cards per turn limit. Shiv builds want to play 8-12 cards per turn. This kills the build.

avoid.name: Snecko Eye
avoid.note: Random costs on cards. Shivs are free regardless, but your Shiv generators and Accuracy get random costs.

avoid.name: Runic Dome
avoid.note: Not knowing intent means you can't decide between going aggressive with Shivs or blocking.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Shuriken
key_relics_sidebar.note: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 1 Strength.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Kunai
key_relics_sidebar.note: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 1 Dexterity.

builds.title: Silent Envenom Build
builds.description: Apply Poison on every single attack hit through Envenom, then amplify it with multi-hit attacks and Shivs. Unlike pure Poison builds that rely on specific poison cards, Envenom turns every attack in your deck into a Poison applicator, creating a devastating hybrid of direct damage and poison scaling.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Envenom
card_acquisition_priority.note: Every Attack applies 1 Poison per hit. Transforms your entire deck into a poison engine. The build's cornerstone.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Fan of Knives
card_acquisition_priority.note: Hit ALL enemies + draw a card. With Envenom, applies Poison to everything on screen.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Finisher
card_acquisition_priority.note: Deal 1 damage per Attack played this turn. Natural payoff for playing many cheap attacks.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Snakebite
card_acquisition_priority.note: Apply Poison on hit. Works even without Envenom, and stacks with it for double Poison application.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Blade Dance
card_acquisition_priority.note: Add 3 Shivs to hand. Each Shiv = 1 attack + 1 Poison with Envenom. High value.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Accuracy
card_acquisition_priority.note: +4 Shiv damage (6 upgraded). Makes Shivs deal real damage alongside Poison application.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Footwork
card_acquisition_priority.note: Gain 2 Dexterity (3 upgraded). Essential defense for a build focused on offensive pressure.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Burst
card_acquisition_priority.note: Play your next Skill twice. Blade Dance x2 = 6 Shivs = 6 Poison + damage. Explosive combo piece.

best.name: Ring of the Snake
best.note: Silent's starter relic. Extra draw turn 1 helps find Envenom and setup cards faster.

best.name: Shuriken
best.note: Gain 1 Strength for every 3 Attacks played. With many small attacks per turn, triggers constantly.

best.name: Kunai
best.note: Gain 1 Dexterity for every 3 Attacks played. Passive defense scaling from your aggressive playstyle.

good.name: Ornamental Fan
good.note: Gain 4 Block for every 3 Attacks played. Defense from doing what you already want to do.

good.name: Nunchaku
good.note: Gain 1 Energy for every 10 Attacks played. Fuels more attack chains.

good.name: Twisted Funnel
good.note: Apply 3 Poison to all enemies at start of combat. Free Poison before Envenom even comes online.

avoid.name: Velvet Choker
avoid.note: 6 card limit is devastating. This build plays 6-10 cards per turn with Shivs and cheap attacks.

avoid.name: Sozu
avoid.note: Potions provide useful burst damage and defense for an aggressive build.

avoid.name: Runic Dome
avoid.note: Need to know when to attack vs defend. The build is fragile without proper Block timing.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Ring of the Snake
key_relics_sidebar.note: At the start of each combat, draw 2 additional cards.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Shuriken
key_relics_sidebar.note: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 1 Strength.

builds.title: Silent Combo Execution Build
builds.description: A defensive scaling powerhouse that chains Wraith Form + Nightmare for multiple turns of Intangible, reducing ALL incoming damage to 1. Footwork stacks Dexterity for massive Block, while Burst doubles key skills. Once set up, you become virtually invincible — the ultimate late-game control deck.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Wraith Form
card_acquisition_priority.note: 2 turns of Intangible (all damage = 1). The build's core defensive card. One copy is enough.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Nightmare
card_acquisition_priority.note: Add 3 copies of target card to hand next turn. Targeting Wraith Form = 6+ Intangible turns. Game-winning.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Footwork
card_acquisition_priority.note: Gain 2 Dexterity (3 upgraded). Stack 2-3 copies for 6-9 permanent Dexterity. Every Block card becomes incredible.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Burst
card_acquisition_priority.note: Play next Skill twice. Burst → Wraith Form = 4 Intangible. Burst → Footwork = double Dexterity.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Well-Laid Plans
card_acquisition_priority.note: Retain 1 card per turn (2 upgraded). Hold Nightmare until Wraith Form is drawn. Enables the combo.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Afterimage
card_acquisition_priority.note: Gain 1 Block per card played. Passive defense that rewards playing many cards during safe turns.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Backflip
card_acquisition_priority.note: 5 Block + draw 2 cards. Efficient defense and cycle to find combo pieces.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Adrenaline
card_acquisition_priority.note: Gain 1 Energy, draw 2 cards, Exhaust. Perfect for combo turns when you need extra resources.

best.name: Ring of the Snake
best.note: Silent's starter. Extra draw turn 1 helps find combo pieces (Footwork, Wraith Form) faster.

best.name: Ice Cream
best.note: Energy conserved between turns. Save Energy during Intangible turns to fuel explosive combo plays.

best.name: Runic Pyramid
best.note: Retain your entire hand between turns. Hold Nightmare until you draw Wraith Form. Perfect synergy.

good.name: Tungsten Rod
good.note: Reduce all HP loss by 1. During Intangible, you already take only 1 — Tungsten Rod makes it 0.

good.name: Pocketwatch
good.note: Draw 3 extra cards if you played 3 or fewer cards. Setup turns often play few cards, triggering this for draw.

good.name: Bag of Preparation
good.note: Draw 2 extra cards turn 1. Critical for finding Footwork and setup cards early.

avoid.name: Velvet Choker
avoid.note: Combo turns often require 6+ card plays (Burst + Nightmare + Footwork + Block cards).

avoid.name: Philosopher Stone
avoid.note: Enemies gain Strength. After Intangible wears off, Strength-boosted enemies hit extremely hard.

avoid.name: Snecko Eye
avoid.note: Randomized costs can make Wraith Form unplayable on key turns. The combo needs precise Energy management.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Ring of the Snake
key_relics_sidebar.note: At the start of each combat, draw 2 additional cards.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Ice Cream
key_relics_sidebar.note: Energy is now conserved between turns.
